title: India is burning more coal as extreme heat and the Iran war squeeze energy supplies
summary_full: India, the world's third-largest emitter of carbon dioxide, is burning more coal as demand for power rises, most of which is coal-fired.
summary_public: India, the world's third-largest emitter of carbon dioxide, is burning more coal as demand for power rises, most of which is coal-fired.
